description: Transmission electron microscopy bright-field image showing microstructure with 500nm scale bar, includes selected area electron diffraction (SAED) pattern inset with [001] zone axis and indexed crystal planes (000, 100, 200, etc.)
Dark-field TEM micrograph with 100nm scale bar showing distribution of nanoscale precipitates (κ-carbide particles) in austenitic matrix
Transmission electron microscopy bright-field image with complex precipitate morphology, includes SAED diffraction pattern inset showing [001] zone axis and indexed planes, 500nm scale bar
Dark-field TEM micrograph with 100nm scale bar showing uniform distribution of nanoscale κ-carbide particles in Fe-Mn-Al-C lightweight steel matrix
Transmission electron microscopy bright-field image showing complex Cu-rich particle and κ-carbide precipitate structure, includes SAED diffraction pattern with [011] zone axis, 500nm scale bar
Dark-field TEM micrograph with 100nm scale bar showing precipitate size distribution in 5Cu heat-treated steel strip for nanoparticle strengthening analysis
